mechanism_narrative: The federal funds rate at 0.09% is near zero, indicating an accommodative monetary stance. Sustained low rates suppress long-term Treasury yields through portfolio rebalancing and reduced term premium. As the Fed maintains this stance, 10-year yields remain anchored downward over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises more than 15 basis points over 20 trading days despite FEDFUNDS remaining below 0.15%, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate at 7.3% signals labor market slack. Elevated joblessness reduces wage pressure and inflation expectations, causing the Fed to maintain accommodative policy. Lower expected inflation and policy rates compress 10-year Treasury yields downward over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls more than 20 basis points despite UNRATE remaining above 7.0%, or forward returns are positive in > 65% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales at 425,881 million dollars combined with housing starts at 891 thousand units indicate moderate demand. Weak demand growth constrains inflation expectations and reduces expectations of future Fed tightening, pushing 10-year yields lower as investors price in extended accommodation.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises more than 10 basis points when both RSAFS < 430000 and HOUST < 900 in > 50% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.04 over rolling 18-month windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production at 99.98 (below trend of 100) signals supply-side weakness. Constrained production capacity limits real output growth and inflation generation. This supply constraint, combined with weak demand, produces deflationary pressure that anchors 10-year yields downward over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises more than 12 basis points when INDPRO < 100.0, or positive forward returns occur in > 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment at 136,554 thousand persons combined with unemployment at 7.3% indicates a labor market in early recovery phase. Improving employment growth without yet triggering wage inflation allows the Fed to maintain low rates. This employment-inflation disconnect keeps 10-year yields compressed downward over the next 5 trading days as market reprices near-term rate expectations.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises more than 8 basis points in 5 trading days despite both PAYEMS > 136000 and UNRATE > 7.0%, or Rank IC < 0.06 over any 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: CPI at 233.947 (year-over-year inflation implied by historical context) combined with FEDFUNDS at 0.09% creates a deeply negative real rate. This negative real rate regime persists as long as inflation remains above 2% and Fed funds stay near zero. Persistent negative real rates suppress long-duration asset yields including 10-year Treasuries over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises more than 40 basis points over 60 trading days when FEDFUNDS < 0.5% and CPIAUCSL > 230, or Rank IC < 0.05 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP at 15,790.1 billion (chained 2017 dollars) combined with weak retail sales and housing starts indicates demand-side deceleration. Slowing real growth reduces expectations of future inflation and Fed rate increases. Market reprices the terminal rate lower, compressing the 10-year yield downward over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises more than 35 basis points over 60 trading days when both GDPC1 growth < 2.0% and RSAFS < 430000, or positive forward returns in > 65% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production at 99.98 combined with elevated unemployment at 7.3% indicates an economy operating below potential with supply-demand imbalance favoring demand weakness. This slack regime produces downward pressure on inflation expectations and reduces the probability of Fed tightening, pushing 10-year yields lower over the next 20 trading days as investors extend duration positioning.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises more than 15 basis points over 20 trading days when both INDPRO < 100.0 and UNRATE > 7.0%, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 18-month rolling window.
